title: USGS Central San Francisco Bay Multibeam Bathymetry and Backscatter
temporal_coverage: Three surveys completed before the January 1999 data release
citation: Dartnell, P., and Gardiner, J.V., 1999, Sea-floor images and data from multibeam surveys in San Francisco Bay, USGS Data Series 55.
limitations: Historical survey useful for geomorphic pretraining and change comparison, not current depth claims.
Coverage is limited to west-central San Francisco Bay.
Backscatter values are sensor- and processing-dependent and require per-survey normalization.
